patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Rogue Frontier Patch 8
description: Rogue Frontier Patch 8 Combat Balance Changes (26 May 2025) — Arcane Staffs, Crossbows, Fire Staffs, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shoes, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Magic Shock Cast time Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Flickershots Arclight Blasters Fire Staffs Searing Flame Range Nature Staffs Living Armor Great Nature Staff Instant heal Quarterstaffs Cartwheel Cooldown movespeed Shoes Vengeful Sprint Demon Boots Miscellaneous line of sight Boulder Crash Earthrune Staff Lightning Storm Battle Eagle spell indication Hail Glacial Obelisk skillshot indicators Searing Flame Magma Sphere Wildfire Staff Fire Wave Rising Blow Cartwheel AoE escalation slow Caltrops Crossbows Frost Bomb Frozen Surge Glacial Obelisk Slowing Charge Hammers Frost Bomb diminishing returns

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Magic Shock Cast time 0.5s 0.35s

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Damage per tick 117 106 Flickershots Arclight Blasters Dash range 7m 8m Dash speed 9.33m/s 10.66m/s

changes.raw_text: Flickershots: Dash range: 7m → 8m; Dash speed: 9.33m/s → 10.66m/s (duration unchanged)

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Living Armor Great Nature Staff Added instant heal 66

changes.raw_text: Living Armor: Added instant heal for 66

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Cartwheel Cooldown 8s 6s Removed 20% movespeed bonus when hit

changes.raw_text: Cartwheel: Cooldown: 8s → 6s; Removed: 20% movespeed bonus when hit

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Vengeful Sprint Demon Boots Move speed per stack 22% 25%

changes.raw_text: Vengeful Sprint: Move speed per stack: 22% → 25%

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous line of sight Boulder Crash Earthrune Staff Lightning Storm Battle Eagle spell indication Hail Glacial Obelisk Frost Staffs skillshot indicators Searing Flame Fire Staffs Magma Sphere Wildfire Staff Fire Wave Rising Blow Cartwheel Quarterstaffs AoE escalation slow Caltrops Crossbows Frost Bomb Frozen Surge Glacial Obelisk Hail Slowing Charge Hammers slow duration Frost Bomb diminishing returns crowd control resistance ability power

changes.ability: No longer require line of sight:
changes.raw_text: Boulder Crash (Earthrune Staff), Lightning Storm (Battle Eagle) — no longer require line of sight
notes: Boulder Crash (Earthrune Staff) — no longer requires line of sight
Lightning Storm (Battle Eagle) — no longer requires line of sight

changes.raw_text: Hail (Great Frost Staff) and Glacial Obelisk (all Frost Staffs) now have more accurate spell indication areas
notes: Hail (Great Frost Staff) — more accurate spell indication area
Glacial Obelisk (all Frost Staffs) — more accurate spell indication area

changes.raw_text: Searing Flame (all Fire Staffs), Magma Sphere (Wildfire Staff), Fire Wave (all Fire Staffs), Rising Blow (all Quarterstaffs), Cartwheel (all Quarterstaffs) — skillshot indicators adjusted
notes: Searing Flame, Magma Sphere, Fire Wave, Rising Blow, Cartwheel — skillshot indicators adjusted

changes.raw_text: Caltrops (all Crossbows), Frost Bomb (all Frost Staffs), Frozen Surge (all Frost Staffs), Glacial Obelisk (all Frost Staffs), Hail (Great Frost Staff) — these abilities now scale their slow duration with AoE escalation
notes: Caltrops, Frost Bomb, Frozen Surge, Glacial Obelisk, Hail — now scale slow duration with AoE escalation

changes.raw_text: Slowing Charge: AoE slow escalation now increases slow duration instead of slow strength
notes: AoE slow escalation now increases slow duration instead of slow strength

changes.raw_text: Frost Bomb: Initial slow area is no longer affected by diminishing returns, crowd control resistance, or ability power scaling
notes: Initial slow area is no longer affected by diminishing returns, crowd control resistance, or ability power scaling
